description: A 15-second vertical 1080×1920 HyperFrames composition that stacks four animated social cards over a face-cam loop — an X post, a Reddit reaction, a Spotify now-playing card, and an Instagram-follow CTA at the end. Each card is a HyperFrames catalog block; the choreography is the value-add.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 15秒竖屏1080×1920 HyperFrames组合，在真人镜头循环上叠加四张动画社交卡片——X帖子、Reddit互动、Spotify正在播放卡片以及结尾的Instagram关注CTA。每张卡片都是HyperFrames目录块，编排是附加价值。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 15秒直立1080×1920 HyperFrames組合，在真人鏡頭循環上堆疊四張動畫社群卡片——X貼文、Reddit回應、Spotify正在播放卡片以及結尾的Instagram追蹤CTA。每張卡片都是HyperFrames目錄區塊，編排是附加價值。
description_i18n.ja: 15秒の縦型1080×1920 HyperFrames構成。フェイスカムループの上に4つのアニメーションソーシャルカードを重ねます—Xの投稿、Redditのリアクション、Spotifyの再生中カード、最後にInstagramのフォローCTA。各カードはHyperFramesカタログブロックで、振り付けが付加価値です。
description_i18n.ko: 15초 세로형 1080×1920 HyperFrames 구성으로, 페이스캠 루프 위에 4개의 애니메이션 소셜 카드를 배치합니다—X 게시물, Reddit 반응, Spotify 재생 중 카드, 마지막 Instagram 팔로우 CTA. 각 카드는 HyperFrames 카탈로그 블록이며, 구성이 부가 가치입니다.
description_i18n.de: Eine 15-sekündige vertikale 1080×1920 HyperFrames-Komposition, die vier animierte Social-Cards über einer Face-Cam-Schleife stapelt – ein X-Post, eine Reddit-Reaktion, eine Spotify-Wiedergabekarte und ein Instagram-Follow-CTA am Ende. Jede Karte ist ein HyperFrames-Katalogblock; die Choreografie ist der Mehrwert.
description_i18n.fr: Une composition HyperFrames verticale de 15 secondes en 1080×1920 qui empile quatre cartes sociales animées sur une boucle face-cam — un post X, une réaction Reddit, une carte Spotify en lecture et un CTA de suivi Instagram à la fin. Chaque carte est un bloc catalogue HyperFrames ; la chorégraphie est la valeur ajoutée.
description_i18n.ru: 15-секундная вертикальная композиция HyperFrames 1080×1920, которая накладывает четыре анимированные социальные карточки поверх лупа с камерой — пост X, реакция Reddit, карточка воспроизведения Spotify и призыв к подписке в Instagram в конце. Каждая карточка — это блок каталога HyperFrames; ценность — в хореографии.
description_i18n.es: Una composición HyperFrames vertical de 15 segundos en 1080×1920 que apila cuatro tarjetas sociales animadas sobre un bucle de cámara frontal: una publicación de X, una reacción de Reddit, una tarjeta de reproducción de Spotify y un CTA de seguimiento de Instagram al final. Cada tarjeta es un bloque del catálogo HyperFrames; la coreografía es el valor añadido.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Uma composição HyperFrames vertical de 15 segundos em 1080×1920 que empilha quatro cards sociais animados sobre um loop de face-cam — um post do X, uma reação do Reddit, um card de reprodução do Spotify e um CTA de seguir do Instagram no final. Cada card é um bloco do catálogo HyperFrames; a coreografia é o valor agregado.
description_i18n.it: Una composizione HyperFrames verticale di 15 secondi in 1080×1920 che sovrappone quattro card social animate su un loop face-cam — un post X, una reazione Reddit, una card di riproduzione Spotify e una CTA di follow Instagram alla fine. Ogni card è un blocco del catalogo HyperFrames; la coreografia è il valore aggiunto.
description_i18n.vi: Tác phẩm HyperFrames dọc 1080×1920 dài 15 giây xếp bốn thẻ xã hội động lên trên vòng lặp face-cam — bài đăng X, phản ứng Reddit, thẻ đang phát Spotify và CTA theo dõi Instagram ở cuối. Mỗi thẻ là khối danh mục HyperFrames; dàn dựng là giá trị gia tăng.
description_i18n.pl: 15-sekundowa pionowa kompozycja HyperFrames 1080×1920, która układa cztery animowane karty społecznościowe na pętli z kamerą — post X, reakcję Reddit, kartę odtwarzania Spotify i CTA obserwowania Instagram na końcu. Każda karta to blok katalogu HyperFrames; choreografia to wartość dodana.
description_i18n.id: Komposisi HyperFrames vertikal 1080×1920 berdurasi 15 detik yang menumpuk empat kartu sosial animasi di atas loop face-cam — postingan X, reaksi Reddit, kartu sedang diputar Spotify, dan CTA ikuti Instagram di akhir. Setiap kartu adalah blok katalog HyperFrames; koreografinya adalah nilai tambah.
description_i18n.nl: Een 15 seconden durende verticale 1080×1920 HyperFrames-compositie die vier geanimeerde sociale kaarten stapelt over een face-cam-loop — een X-post, een Reddit-reactie, een Spotify-afspeelkaart en een Instagram-volg-CTA aan het einde. Elke kaart is een HyperFrames-catalogusblok; de choreografie is de toegevoegde waarde.
description_i18n.ar: تركيبة HyperFrames عمودية مدتها 15 ثانية بدقة 1080×1920 تكدس أربع بطاقات اجتماعية متحركة فوق حلقة كاميرا الوجه — منشور X، تفاعل Reddit، بطاقة تشغيل Spotify، ودعوة لمتابعة Instagram في النهاية. كل بطاقة هي كتلة كتالوج HyperFrames؛ التنسيق هو القيمة المضافة.
description_i18n.tr: Yüz kamerası döngüsü üzerine dört animasyonlu sosyal kartı yığan 15 saniyelik dikey 1080×1920 HyperFrames kompozisyonu — bir X gönderisi, bir Reddit tepkisi, bir Spotify çalıyor kartı ve sonunda bir Instagram takip CTA'sı. Her kart bir HyperFrames katalog bloğudur; koreografi katma değerdir.
description_i18n.uk: 15-секундна вертикальна композиція HyperFrames 1080×1920, яка накладає чотири анімовані соціальні картки на луп з камерою — пост X, реакція Reddit, картка відтворення Spotify та заклик до підписки в Instagram наприкінці. Кожна картка — це блок каталогу HyperFrames; цінність — у хореографії.
description_i18n.en: A 15-second vertical 1080×1920 HyperFrames composition that stacks four animated social cards over a face-cam loop — an X post, a Reddit reaction, a Spotify now-playing card, and an Instagram-follow CTA at the end. Each card is a HyperFrames catalog block; the choreography is the value-add.

query.en:
Build a 15-second vertical HyperFrames composition (1080×1920, 30fps) that lays four animated social cards in sequence over a muted face-cam loop. Pull all four catalog blocks first: `npx hyperframes add x-post`, `npx hyperframes add reddit-post`, `npx hyperframes add spotify-card`, `npx hyperframes add instagram-follow`.

Visual identity: warm canvas #1a1410, off-white #fff8f1 for chrome, single hot accent #ff5e3a on glow rings around incoming cards. Display: "Inter" 26px tracked normal, the social cards keep their authentic in-platform typefaces (x-post → system, reddit-post → IBM Plex Sans / equivalent, spotify-card → Circular fallback, instagram-follow → SF Pro fallback).

Layer structure:
• Track 0: <video> face-cam.mp4 (muted playsinline) full-bleed background, slightly desaturated via CSS filter.
• Track 1: solid #1a1410 at 38% opacity scrim across the bottom 32% of canvas, full duration, to keep cards readable.
• Track 2: x-post card, data-start=0.4, data-duration=3.2, slides in from x=-340 → 0 ease expo.out 0.6s, holds 2.2s, no exit (transitions handle).
• Track 3: reddit-post card, data-start=3.6, data-duration=3.4, slides in from y=80 → 0 ease power3.out 0.5s, holds.
• Track 4: spotify-card, data-start=7.0, data-duration=4.0, slides in from x=+340 → 0 ease expo.out 0.6s, with the album-art rotating gently inside its built-in pose.
• Track 5: instagram-follow card, data-start=11.0, data-duration=4.0, scales 0.9 → 1 + opacity 0 → 1 ease back.out(1.4) 0.7s, holds to 15s end with the follow button pulsing once at 13.5s.

Between consecutive cards (3.6s, 7.0s, 11.0s) drop a 0.18s flash-through-white shader (`npx hyperframes add flash-through-white`) for a snappy beat. Each card's landing frame should align with a beat (assume 90 BPM = 666ms grid).

Non-negotiables: each social card's text content should be specific to the user's brief — feed real example handles / posts (or the user's own brand) into the slot data on each block. No animating video element dimensions — wrap face-cam in a non-timed div if you need to scale. All timelines paused:true. Deterministic only. Root data-duration=15, data-width=1080, data-height=1920. Run `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 15` and confirm no card spills off the 1080-wide canvas.

Output: `social-overlay-stack-15s.mp4`.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 15-second vertical HyperFrames composition (1080×1920, 30fps) that lays four animated social cards in sequence over a muted face-cam loop. Pull all four catalog blocks first: `npx hyperframes add x-post`, `npx hyperframes add reddit-post`, `npx hyperframes add spotify-card`, `npx hyperframes add instagram-follow`.

Visual identity: warm canvas #1a1410, off-white #fff8f1 for chrome, single hot accent #ff5e3a on glow rings around incoming cards. Display: "Inter" 26px tracked normal, the social cards keep their authentic in-platform typefaces (x-post → system, reddit-post → IBM Plex Sans / equivalent, spotify-card → Circular fallback, instagram-follow → SF Pro fallback).

Layer structure:
• Track 0: <video> face-cam.mp4 (muted playsinline) full-bleed background, slightly desaturated via CSS filter.
• Track 1: solid #1a1410 at 38% opacity scrim across the bottom 32% of canvas, full duration, to keep cards readable.
• Track 2: x-post card, data-start=0.4, data-duration=3.2, slides in from x=-340 → 0 ease expo.out 0.6s, holds 2.2s, no exit (transitions handle).
• Track 3: reddit-post card, data-start=3.6, data-duration=3.4, slides in from y=80 → 0 ease power3.out 0.5s, holds.
• Track 4: spotify-card, data-start=7.0, data-duration=4.0, slides in from x=+340 → 0 ease expo.out 0.6s, with the album-art rotating gently inside its built-in pose.
• Track 5: instagram-follow card, data-start=11.0, data-duration=4.0, scales 0.9 → 1 + opacity 0 → 1 ease back.out(1.4) 0.7s, holds to 15s end with the follow button pulsing once at 13.5s.

Between consecutive cards (3.6s, 7.0s, 11.0s) drop a 0.18s flash-through-white shader (`npx hyperframes add flash-through-white`) for a snappy beat. Each card's landing frame should align with a beat (assume 90 BPM = 666ms grid).

Non-negotiables: each social card's text content should be specific to the user's brief — feed real example handles / posts (or the user's own brand) into the slot data on each block. No animating video element dimensions — wrap face-cam in a non-timed div if you need to scale. All timelines paused:true. Deterministic only. Root data-duration=15, data-width=1080, data-height=1920. Run `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 15` and confirm no card spills off the 1080-wide canvas.

Output: `social-overlay-stack-15s.mp4`.
